feed.title: Reverse World
feed.subtitle: A minimal, portfolio, sidebar, bootstrap Jekyll theme with responsive web design and focuses on text presentation.

entry.title: Become a Full-Stack Reverse-engineer(In only 3 short years)

link.title: Become a Full-Stack Reverse-engineer(In only 3 short years)

entry.summary: Become a Full-Stack Reverse-engineer(In only 3 short years) Thanks for @daeken. You’ve always inspired me. What this is This is a roadmap to becoming capable of working at any level of abstraction in software. It won’t make you an expert reverse-engineer, breaker of things, kernel developer, compiler developer, graphics programmer, or anything else. It will give you the foundation to become an...
